heading: “Long-term contract” defined
label: 485h–3 “Long-term contract” defined
text: As used in sections 485h–1 to 485h–5 of this title, the term “long-term contract” shall mean any contract the term of which is more than ten years.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Reclamation Project Act of 1939 which comprises this subchapter.
